data.title: Blockchain Builders announces $28 million in Fund I
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Blockchain Builders, a blockchain venture fund with Stanford University background, announced that its Fund I has completed $28 million in fundraising. The fund was founded by Stanford University graduate students Gil Rosen, Kun Peng and Steven Willinger. It has invested more than $16 million in 40 blockchain companies, covering artificial intelligence, infrastructure, Defi, DePIN, payment and RWA. The remaining funds are expected to be deployed to other blockchain projects by the end of the year. (Chainwire)

data.title: BNB Chain Launches Exclusive Incentive Program for Real-World Asset (RWA) Projects
data.description: BNB Chain has announced the launch of an exclusive Real-World Asset (RWA) track incentive program. The program aims to provide comprehensive, customized support for RWA projects that are building on or migrating to BNB Chain, accelerating RWA adoption and empowering project growth. Support includes, but is not limited to: technical and compliance guidance,  liquidity seeding and TVL incentives, growth-focused funding and marketing, as well as customized roadmaps for scalability.Applications will open on May 29 and remain open on a rolling basis. Once submitted, projects will undergo a multi-dimensional evaluation process, with high-quality RWA projects eligible for incentive support. Applications are not limited to any specific RWA sub-sector. Projects are also encouraged to integrate with the DeFiLlama platform to enhance visibility and accessibility for users.

data.title: Solana Ecosystem Blockchain Payment Network Zebec Network Acquires Science Card
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Zebec Network, a blockchain payment network based on Solana, has acquired Science Card, a secure and transparent financial tool for students, researchers and university faculty. This acquisition enriches Zebec's powerful card product line and may expand its crypto debit card and other products. (Chainwire)

data.title: Telegram Secures $1.7 Billion in Convertible Bonds for Debt Refinancing
data.description: According to PANews, Telegram has successfully issued $1.7 billion in five-year convertible bonds. This move aims to refinance $955 million of existing debt due in 2026 and raise an additional $745 million. The bonds carry a coupon rate of 9%, which is 200 basis points higher than the initial bonds issued in 2021. Investors will have the option to redeem the bonds at 80% of the IPO price if Telegram goes public. Currently, Telegram boasts over 1 billion users, with revenue expected to surpass $1 billion in 2024. The company holds more than $500 million in cash reserves, excluding cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: Degen: Airdrop 2 and Raindrops will start tomorrow
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Degen posted on the X platform that Airdrop 2 and Raindrops will be available tomorrow, and users can claim them through verified Farcaster wallets. In addition, Degen is optimizing the Degen app to make claiming, payment, and browsing smoother.

data.title: Analysts: Upward revision of US GDP will not change the Fed's wait-and-see stance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Granite Bay analyst Paul Stanley said that the upward revision of the US GDP data in the first quarter may not change the Fed's wait-and-see stance. He expects the Fed to resume interest rate cuts this fall, and said that the Fed may cut interest rates 1 to 2 times in the last few months of 2025. According to data from the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME), this expectation is consistent with market pricing. The second estimate of US GDP in the first quarter showed that the economy shrank by 0.2%, narrower than the previously announced 0.3% contraction. (Jinshi)

data.title: A young Russian couple who ran a cryptocurrency business was kidnapped in Argentina and released after paying a ransom of $43,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News A young Russian couple who ran a cryptocurrency business was kidnapped in Buenos Aires, Argentina, and was released after remitting a ransom of $43,000 to the attackers. After identifying the main suspects, the Argentine Federal Police (PFA) found that the attackers fled the country by plane within a few hours of the incident. They should have taken a flight from Ezeiza to the United Arab Emirates, and they have all been marked with a red alert by Interpol. (tn.com.ar)

data.title: Russian Couple Kidnapped in Argentina Released After Ransom Payment
data.description: According to Odaily, a young Russian couple involved in cryptocurrency business was kidnapped in Buenos Aires, Argentina. They were released after paying a ransom of $43,000 to their captors. The Argentine Federal Police (PFA) identified the main suspects, who fled the country by plane just hours after the incident. The suspects are believed to have boarded a flight from Ezeiza to the United Arab Emirates and are currently under a red alert by Interpol.

data.title: Circle Freezes Two Wallets in Libra Memecoin Scandal, Totaling $57.6M
data.description:
TL;DR Circle, issuer of the USDC stablecoin, froze two Solana-based wallets linked to the Libra memecoin scandal, holding a total of $57. 6 million. The freeze was ordered through judicial action involving both U. S. and Argentine authorities. The crypto community is calling for greater transparency regarding who requested the freeze and under what legal framework it. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/circle-freezes-two-wallets-in-libra-memecoin-scandal-totaling-57-6m/

data.title: US County Token 240 Billion in Real Estate on Blockchain
data.description:
New Jersey's most populous county tokenizes $240 billion in real estate using Avalanche, revolutionising the land registry with blockchain.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/blockchain/us-county-token-240-billion-in-real-estate-on-blockchain/

data.title: A whale spent 2.2 million DAI to buy 2.27 million LDO at an average price of $0.96
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale spent 2.2 million DAI to buy 2.27 million LDO, with an average purchase price of $0.96. The whale still holds 737,000 DAI and may buy more LDO.

data.title: White House trade adviser Navarro talks about the trade court ruling: A trade deal will be reached
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: White House trade adviser Navarro talked about the trade court ruling and said that the court is hindering US President Trump's policy agenda, and a trade agreement will be reached, and nothing has really changed. (Jinshi)

data.title: White House Trade Advisor Comments on Trade Court Ruling
data.description: According to BlockBeats, White House Trade Advisor Peter Navarro stated that despite the recent trade court ruling, nothing substantial has changed, and a trade agreement will be reached.

data.title: Schroders Capital's fund of funds has raised more than $600 million and plans to invest in financial technology and Gen AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Schroders Capital announced that its fund Schroders Capital Private Equity Global Innovation XI Fund has completed fundraising of over US$600 million and plans to invest in areas such as financial technology and generative artificial intelligence Gen AI. Schroders Capital is an investor in crypto-friendly digital bank Revolut, and its business covers alternative asset classes, including infrastructure, secondary markets, securitized products, etc. (Techfundingnews)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 0.48% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 29, 2025, 12:42 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,689.350098 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.48% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Schroders Capital Fund Secures Over $600 Million for Fintech and AI Investments
data.description: According to Odaily, Schroders Capital has announced the successful fundraising of over $600 million for its Schroders Capital Private Equity Global Innovation XI Fund. The fund aims to invest in sectors such as financial technology and generative artificial intelligence. Schroders Capital is known for its investment in the crypto-friendly digital bank Revolut and operates across various alternative asset classes, including infrastructure, secondary markets, and securitized products.

data.title: Stablecoins Backed by U.S. Dollar Could Enhance American Influence, Says Vice President Vance
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Vice President Vance stated at the 'Bitcoin 2025' conference that stablecoins backed by the U.S. dollar have the potential to strengthen America's influence abroad. He described these digital currencies as a 'force multiplier' for extending U.S. influence globally.

data.title: The revised annualized quarterly rate of real GDP in the first quarter of the United States was -0.2%, expected to be -0.30%, and the previous value was -0.30%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The revised annualized quarterly rate of real GDP in the first quarter of the United States was -0.2%, expected to be -0.30%, and the previous value was -0.30%. (Jinshi)

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 was 240,000, while the expected number was 230,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 was 240,000, which was expected to be 230,000. The previous value was revised from 227,000 to 226,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Rise to 240,000, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 reached 240,000. This figure surpassed the anticipated 230,000 claims. The previous week's data was revised from 227,000 to 226,000.
